LanguageData.FCP_Gun_DKS_501_Sniper_Rifle.label: DKS-501 Sniper Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_DKS_501_Sniper_Rifle.description: The DKS-501 is a pre-war bolt-action sniper rifle chambered for .308 rounds. Known for its exceptional accuracy and stopping power, it is a favorite among marksmen for long-range engagements.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Scoped_Hunting_Rifle.label: Scoped Hunting Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Scoped_Hunting_Rifle.description: The Scoped Hunting Rifle is a pre-war bolt-action rifle chambered for .308 rounds. Equipped with a scope, it is highly accurate and effective for medium to long-range engagements, making it a reliable choice for hunters and marksmen alike.
